assertions.name: MenuItem entry point
assertions.text: Has [MenuItem("Tools/Frame Debugger/Capture All Events")] entry point
assertions.evidence: Line 42: [MenuItem("Tools/Frame Debugger/Capture All Events")] attribute is present on StartCapture() method.

assertions.name: EditorApplication.update state machine with 3 phases
assertions.text: Uses EditorApplication.update as the tick mechanism with a state machine (Phase 1: wait for events, Phase 2: iterate with limit, Phase 3: cleanup)
assertions.evidence: Line 65 adds CaptureTick to EditorApplication.update. Phase 1 (lines 77-99): waits for _csv == null and _eventCount > 0. Phase 2 (lines 102-135): captures event at limit-1, advances target, sets new limit. Phase 3 (lines 128-131): calls FinishCapture when targetIndex >= eventCount.

assertions.name: Limit per event with frame wait
assertions.text: Sets limit per event (limit = targetIndex + 1) and waits one frame before reading GetFrameEventData
assertions.evidence: Line 98 sets SetLimit(1) then returns, effectively waiting for next EditorApplication.update tick. Line 135 sets SetLimit(_targetEventIndex + 1). Lines 105-108 call GetFrameEventData on the subsequent tick after the limit was set.

assertions.name: RFC 4180 CSV escaping
assertions.text: Outputs CSV with proper RFC 4180 escaping (quotes fields containing commas, newlines, or double-quotes)
assertions.evidence: Escape() method (lines 180-188) checks for commas, double-quotes, newlines, carriage returns. Wraps value in double-quotes and doubles internal quotes when any delimiter character is found, matching RFC 4180.

assertions.name: Cleanup on completion
assertions.text: Removes EditorApplication.update handler and disables FrameDebugger when capture completes
assertions.evidence: FinishCapture() (lines 142-170): line 145 calls EditorApplication.update -= CaptureTick to remove the handler, and line 148 calls FrameDebuggerReflect.SetEnabled(false, ...) to disable the FrameDebugger.
